subcodes.first_line: O Pen of this Wronged One! At all times thou gazest upon the loved ones, and upon that which causeth exaltation and loftiness and prosperity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم این مظلوم در جمیع اوقات باولیا ناظر و آنچه سبب علو و علت سمو و نعمت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity
